title: Hook for orientation events on mobile devices
scenario_context: Track orientation explicitly for game-like UX that depends on rotation.
responsive_reasoning: 1. screen.orientation API.\n2. Or matchMedia (orientation).\n3. Listen to changes.
accessibility_across_viewports: Keyboard order, visible focus, readable labels, hit targets, and content order remain equivalent across mobile, tablet, and desktop layouts.

title: Email subject in inbox list with adaptive metadata (sender, time, snippet)
scenario_context: Email row in narrow sidebar vs main pane. Narrow shows minimal; wide shows full.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container query.\n2. Progressive disclosure of metadata.\n3. Subject always primary.
accessibility_across_viewports: Full text on hover (title) for truncated.

title: Form labels that scale subtly with input size
scenario_context: Settings page section labels vs field labels. Hierarchy maintained via subtle size differences.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Section labels larger, field labels smaller.\n2. clamp() for fluid.\n3. Clear hierarchy.

title: Form padding scales with form width via container query
scenario_context: Form padding inside narrow modal vs wide page. Wide gets generous; narrow tight.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container query.\n2. Padding scales.\n3. Form readable.

title: Drag-to-scroll vs swipe-to-scroll on different inputs
scenario_context: Card carousel. Touch: native swipe. Desktop: mouse drag (no scrollbar typically on touchpad). Both flow naturally.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Mouse drag conflicts with text selection
responsive_reasoning: 1. Touch native swipe.\n2. Mouse drag via pointer events.\n3. Both feel right.

title: Search input with clear button that's accessible during keyboard active
scenario_context: Search field with X to clear. Must remain tappable above keyboard.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Clear button inside search input.\n2. 44pt minimum.\n3. Always accessible.
accessibility_across_viewports: aria-label on clear. type=search has native clear in some browsers.

title: Status bar style adjustments via theme-color meta tag
scenario_context: iOS PWA status bar color matches app theme. theme-color meta tag.
responsive_reasoning: 1. theme-color matches app.\n2. Light/dark variants.\n3. Native feel.

title: Photo editor with adaptive tool placement per orientation
scenario_context: Photo editor. Portrait: tools below image. Landscape: tools beside image.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Orientation drives tool placement.\n2. Image always primary.\n3. Tools wrap around.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Orientation drives. 2) Image primary. 3) Tools adapt.

title: Drawer panels that resize on iPad with persistence
scenario_context: iPad app with resizable panels. Users adjust widths; persists per orientation.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Resizable per responsive-010.\n2. Persist per orientation.\n3. Clamp to valid range.

title: Slideshow + thumbnails: thumbs adapt position per viewport
scenario_context: Slideshow with thumbnail strip. Wide: thumbs bottom. Tall narrow: thumbs hidden behind toggle.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Thumbs supplement.\n2. Mobile thumbs hidden by default.\n3. Show on user request.

interaction_model_per_device.mobile_touch: Swipe images, tap to show thumbs

what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Adaptive thumb visibility. 2) Mobile toggle. 3) Universal images.

title: Group-by header rows with sticky group headers
scenario_context: Contacts list grouped by letter. Group headers sticky as scrolling within group.
responsive_reasoning: 1. position: sticky on group headers.\n2. Scrolls until next group.\n3. iOS-style contacts.

title: Date range picker with two inputs that work native or custom per pointer
scenario_context: Start and end date inputs. Touch: native pickers. Desktop: custom calendar.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-012.\n2. Two inputs.\n3. Validation (end >= start).

title: Image zoom on click that respects aspect ratio in lightbox
scenario_context: Click thumbnail → fullscreen lightbox with native pinch zoom + reset on close.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Lightbox preserves aspect via object-contain.\n2. Pinch zoom CSS or library.\n3. Reset on each open.

title: User context switcher (multiple accounts) with active indicator
scenario_context: User can switch between accounts (work/personal). Current account always visible. Switch via dropdown.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Active account name in nav.\n2. Switcher dropdown.\n3. Visual indicator (color, badge).
accessibility_across_viewports: aria-expanded. Active indicated visually + via Check icon.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Always visible context. 2) Color coding. 3) Universal.

title: Toast with action button that doesn't dismiss until action invoked
scenario_context: Action toast ('Item deleted. Undo'). Stays until user clicks action or auto-dismisses after longer timeout.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Action toasts get longer timeout.\n2. Action button prominent.\n3. Per responsive-075.

title: Service worker for offline reads of static content
scenario_context: Articles cached when first viewed. Available offline next time.
responsive_reasoning: 1. SW caches GET requests.\n2. Network-first strategy with fallback.\n3. Stale-while-revalidate option.

title: Hook for detecting if scrollbar is present (causes layout differences)
scenario_context: Page width changes when scrollbar appears. Compensate for stability.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Scrollbar width = window.innerWidth - documentElement.clientWidth.\n2. Reserve via scrollbar-gutter or padding.\n3. Modern CSS scrollbar-gutter: stable.
edge_cases_handled: Page that grows beyond viewport — scrollbar appears, no shift
Touch devices — overlay scrollbar, no gutter needed
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) CSS-native solution. 2) JS hook for advanced. 3) Stable layout.

title: Settings group panel with adaptive heading hierarchy
scenario_context: Settings group with heading + description + controls. Heading size adapts to panel width.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container query adjusts heading.\n2. cqi units.\n3. Per-panel adaptation.

title: Tabular numeric data with column alignment via tabular-nums
scenario_context: List of prices. All digits should align vertically regardless of digit width.
responsive_reasoning: 1. tabular-nums forces monospace digits.\n2. Applied per column.\n3. tabular-nums in CSS feature.
accessibility_across_viewports: Keyboard order, visible focus, readable labels, hit targets, and content order remain equivalent across mobile, tablet, and desktop layouts.

title: Stack with optional dividers between items
scenario_context: Stack of items with optional border between. Compact or generous spacing.
responsive_reasoning: 1. divide-y utility or :not(:last-child) border.\n2. Combined with gap.\n3. Single declaration.

title: Slider with steps that snap to values on touch but allow precision on mouse
scenario_context: Volume slider 0-100. Touch: snap to 10. Mouse: precise. Pointer-aware step.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Touch benefits from snap.\n2. Mouse fine control.\n3. Per-pointer step value.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Step per pointer. 2) Native input. 3) Universal.

title: Search with results that don't push form below keyboard
scenario_context: Search input with dropdown results. Results appear below input. Keyboard pushes form up; results shouldn't push input below keyboard.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Results below input pushing search off-screen
Fixed positioning that doesn't account for keyboard
responsive_reasoning: 1. Results stay below input but capped to fit visible.\n2. visualViewport for available height.\n3. Per responsive-186.

title: Fullscreen video controls that adapt to landscape notch position
scenario_context: Video in landscape with notch on one side. Controls in safe area regardless of which side.
responsive_reasoning: 1. env() per direction.\n2. Same code, dynamic insets.\n3. Universal.

title: Compact landscape mode for music apps (mini player + sidebar)
scenario_context: Music app in landscape phone. Very compact — mini player + horizontal track list. Different from portrait full-screen player.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Landscape phone tiny vertical.\n2. Horizontal arrangement.\n3. Compact controls.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Landscape compact. 2) Track list visible. 3) Orientation-driven.

title: iPad Stage Manager: app handles arbitrary windowed sizes
scenario_context: App opens in window 600px x 400px on iPad. Adapts like a tiny laptop window — full responsive design needed.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Width-based responsive design works.\n2. Stage Manager just produces unusual sizes.\n3. Test at unusual viewports.

title: Live broadcast viewer with chat sidebar that toggles on tablet portrait
scenario_context: Stream view. Tablet portrait: video full-width, chat below. Tablet landscape: video left, chat right. Phone landscape: chat hidden, button to reveal.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-248.\n2. More refinement for tablet portrait.\n3. Universal stream pattern.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Stream + chat. 2) Multiple breakpoints. 3) User control.

title: Live status indicator (online/offline) on table rows
scenario_context: User list with online status dot. Adapts size with row.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Color + icon + label.\n2. Size adapts.\n3. Container queries.

title: Country selector with flag icons and search
scenario_context: Country selector with flag emojis (universal) + search. Mobile native vs desktop combobox.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Flags aid recognition.\n2. Native picker mobile.\n3. Per responsive-088.

title: Video transcript that displays as subtitles or full text panel
scenario_context: Video with transcript. Mobile: subtitles overlay. Desktop: side panel with synced text.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Subtitles always available.\n2. Desktop adds side panel.\n3. Sync via timecodes.
accessibility_across_viewports: Transcript always accessible (mobile via captions on video itself).

title: Cmd palette with keyboard shortcuts table
scenario_context: Cmd palette opens (Cmd+K). Lists actions with their keyboard shortcuts visible.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-060.\n2. Shortcuts visible only when keyboard attached.\n3. Format per platform.
